summary: Recent changes in the Media Capabilities area of Firefox focus on improving how the browser handles WebRTC, which is the technology behind video calls and real-time communication. Specifically, the update introduces restrictions on the use of the scalabilityMode parameter, ensuring that it is only accepted once a certain bug fix (Bug 1571470) is implemented. This change matters because it helps maintain the browser's performance and reliability during video calls, preventing potential issues until the necessary improvements are fully in place. _While users may not notice any immediate changes, this step is essential for future enhancements in media streaming capabilities._
